text:
Once upon a time in a quaint little town named Serenia, there lived a wise old owl named Thorne. Every feathered resident of Serenia had heard stories of Thorne's incredible wisdom, so whenever an enigma crossed their minds, they'd head straight to his old oak tree.

One evening, the town clock chimed twelve times, signalling the start of the annual Cherry Blossom Festival. People from far and wide came to Serenia to admire the delicate flowers that seemed to dance in the gentle breeze. Thorne perched on top of his favorite branch, watching children weaving through the crowd with tiny bags of cherry turnovers.

As the festival progressed, a mysterious shadow loomed overhead. It was Lucy Nightshade, a notorious thief known as the Fox's Feather. She had come to Serenia to steal something... unusual. Just before she could pluck Thorne's wisdom out of the air, a flock of starling birds swooped down, blinding her with their shiny feathers
